title: thebasics:thebasics-handbook-title-utilities
text: Utilities is the small-tools drawer for The BASICs. These features are not the main RP experience, but they help server operations and quality of life. Server config controls the notification-style features, and root privileges gate repair tools. Home and spawn Players can use /sethome to save their current location and /home to return to it. Players can use /spawn to return to the server spawn. Staff can use /setspawn to set The BASICs' spawn destination; until that is set, /spawn uses the world's default spawn. Server config can optionally require /home and /spawn to consume a temporal gear. Save notifications When enabled by config, the server can announce when a save starts and when it finishes. The announcement can be sent as chat text or as a client notification depending on config. Expect brief lag during saves. Sleep notifier The sleep notifier system can help servers communicate sleep state. Its exact behavior depends on server config and the active Vintage Story sleep rules. Repair helper The root-gated /setdurability <durability> command changes the held durable item's current durability. Use a raw durability number or /setdurability 100% to fully repair it. This is an administrative utility, not a normal player repair system.
